characters.name: Aaron McReary
characters.description: Aaron McRearyAliasesAgent Aaron McRearyRelatives—AffiliationBureau of Land ManagementOccupationBLM AgentBiographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—StatusAliveDate of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count1Portrayed byAustin GrantFirst appearanceLast appearance"Kill the Messenger""Kill the Messenger" Aaron McRearyis a BLM agent in Montana who was investigating the deaths during the cattle dispute between theYellowstone Dutton Ranchand theBroken Rock Reservation.  He is known to be a religious man, soJohn DuttonaskedFather Bobto convince him to recant his statements from the clash near the reservation.

characters.name: Alec
characters.description: AlecAliases—Relatives—AffiliationMontana Livestock AssociationOccupationSheep HerderLivestock Agent (Cover)Biographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of BirthScotlandStatusDeceasedDate of DeathMarch 28, 1924Cause of DeathShot bySpencer DuttonPlace of DeathLivingstonStation, MontanaPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count5Portrayed byColt BrownFirst appearanceLast appearance"The War Has Come Home""A Dream and a Memory" Alecis a character in Part1&2ofA Yellowstone Origin Story. Alec is a Scottish shepherd who worked alongsideBanner Creighton. He was the one who followed the Duttons to Bozeman to warn his friends of their arrival and thus set an ambush for them. After Creighton allied himself withDonald Whitfield, Alec, along withClyde, infiltrated theMontana Livestock Associationas an agent to spy on the Duttons, helping set the footwork for Whitfield's plan in taking theValley.

characters.name: Alice Davis
characters.description: Alice DavisAliasesAlice Chow (Maiden Name)RelativesZane Davis(Husband)Matthew Davis(Son)Madelyne Davis(Daughter)Affiliation—Occupation—Biographical informationRelationship statusMarriedDate of Birth—Place of Birth—Status—Date of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight—Weight—Eye colorBrownEthnicityAsianAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count6Portrayed byJoy OsmanskiFirst appearanceLast appearance"Nothing Left to Lose""A Dream and a Memory" Alice Chow-Davisis the wife ofZane Davis. She has 2 children with Zane,MatthewandMadelyne, and keep their marriage a secret primarily due to the Montana Anti-Miscegenation Law, seeing how she is Asian and Zane is a white man. She was arrested for the violation after Clive followed Zane to his home and alerted the state police.

characters.description: Alice WahlAliases—Relatives—AffiliationHeartson Middle SchoolOccupation—Biographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—Status—Date of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—Ethnicity—AppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count3Portrayed bySavonna SpracklinFirst appearanceLast appearance"Kill the Messenger""A Monster is Among Us" Alice Wahlis a school teacher and faculty member of theHeartsong Middle School.

characters.name: Alina
characters.description: AlinaAliases—RelativesMikel(Husband) †AffiliationTexas-Oregon CaravanOccupation—Biographical informationRelationship statusMarriedDate of Birth—Place of BirthItalyStatusDeceasedDate of Death—Cause of DeathShot by ColtonPlace of DeathWyoming TerritoryPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight—Weight—Eye colorBlueEthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count—Portrayed byAmanda JarosFirst appearanceLast appearance"1883""Racing Clouds" Alinais an immigrant from Italy who joins the caravan along with her husbandMikeltrekking fromFort Worthto Oregon. Originally from Italy, she and her husband, Mikel, traveled with the rest of the immigrants to Texas and joinedShea Brennanon a voyage through the untamed west towards Oregon. Unlike her husband, she knew very little English and was a known seamstress. She even made some pants forElsa Dutton. As the caravan reached the Wyoming Territory, they ran into trouble with the local Lakota tribe, and a misunderstanding resulted in many people scalped and murdered, including her husband. She was shot up, scalped, and left for dead. WhenColtondiscovered her, she went completely ballistic and lost her senses. Colton did the honorable thing and put her out of her misery.

characters.name: Alina

Thomas HowellFirst appearanceLast appearance"Wrap Thee in Terror""Only Gunshots to Guide Us" Andersis a character featured in the second part of 1923:A Yellowstone Origin Story. He is an old cowboy in Texas who agreed to giveTeonna,Runs His Horse, andPete Plenty Cloudsa job working in herding cattle for him. Shortly after they left, he learned fromMarshal KentandFather Renaudthat Teonna was wanted for murder and confirmed that they did work for him for a time.

characters.name: Andrew Henderson
characters.description: Andrew HendersonAliasesDr. HendersonRelatives—Affiliation—OccupationPhysicianBiographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—Status—Date of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count1Portrayed byDamon CarneyFirst appearanceLast appearance"A Dream and a Memory""A Dream and a Memory" Dr. Andrew Hendersonis a character featured in1923:A Yellowstone Origin Story. He is a physician who was aboard the same train toLivingstonthatSpencer Duttonwas riding. Upon seeingAlexandra Duttonstranded in the frozenMontanawilderness, he agreed to treat her gangrene infection and recommended she be sent to the hospital inBozeman. There, he scrubbed up and aided the other doctors in saving the baby, forcing an early birth forher son. When Alexandra was told she needed her hands and feet to be amputated to save her life, she refused, choosing to die and spend little time she had left rather than live as an invalid. Henderson respected her wish.

characters.name: Angela Blue Thunder
characters.description: Angela Blue ThunderAliases—Relatives—AffiliationBroken Rock ReservationOccupationLawyerBusiness ConsultantBiographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—StatusAliveDate of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityNative AmericanAppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count—Portrayed byQ'orianka KilcherFirst appearanceLast appearance"Going Back to Cali""Cigarettes, Whiskey, a Meadow and You" Angela Blue Thunderis a business consultant hired byThomas Rainwaterto fend offMarket Equitieswho are not only a threat toYellowstone Dutton Ranch, but toBroken Rock Reservation. Though she reluctantly agrees to help Rainwater, her agenda on the other hand is unclear. After her absence inSeason 4, she reemerged inSeason 5.

characters.name: Art Hansen
characters.description: Art HansenAliases—Relatives—AffiliationU.S. Fish and WildlifeOccupationGame Warden SupervisorBiographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—StatusAliveDate of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count—Portrayed byBoo ArnoldFirst appearanceLast appearance"Horses in Heaven""Horses in Heaven" Art Hansenis a supervisor in the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Services. After a set of collared wolves went onthe Ranchand a collar was discovered connected to some bark going downstream, he confronted John at the Governor's Mansion in Helena along withJeffrey HayesandDale Meddersand showed him their GPS routes. Whole Art had no evidence suggesting the ranch hands killed the wolves, he was very suspicious of foul play.

characters.name: Art Hansen
characters.description: Art HansenAliases—Relatives—AffiliationU.S. Fish and WildlifeOccupationGame Warden SupervisorBiographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—StatusAliveDate of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count—Portrayed byBoo ArnoldFirst appearanceLast appearance"Horses in Heaven""Horses in Heaven" Art Hansenis a supervisor in the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Services. characters.name: Arthur II
characters.description: Arthur IIAliasesEarl Arthur of SussexRelativesArthur, Count of Sussex(Father)Countess of Sussex (Mother)AffiliationRoyal Family of SussexOccupationEarl of SussexBiographical informationRelationship statusFormerly EngagedDate of Birth—Place of BirthEnglandStatusDeceasedDate of Death1923Cause of DeathDrowned in the Atlantic courtesy ofSpencer DuttonPlace of DeathThe Majestic, AtlanticPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye colorBlueEthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count—Portrayed byRafe SouleFirst appearanceLast appearance"Nature's Empty Throne""Nothing Left to Lose" Arthur IIis a character featured in thefirst partof 1923:A Yellowstone Origin Story. He is the ex-fiancée ofAlexandria of Sussexas well as the son ofArthur, Count of Sussexand the Countess. He is the Earl of Sussex, England. He and his family, along with Alexandria where vacationing in Kenya, during which Alexandria fell forSpencer Duttonand chose to break off the engagement with him. They each encountered each other in Marseilles, France, and during the journey to England, he demanded a duel with Spencer while berating Alexandria. Spencer agreed to a duel on the deck of the ship and proved to be a formidable foe against Arthur. Spencer then demanded Arthur to yield, only Arthur was too stubborn to do so as he drew a pistol on Spencer, resulting in Spencer throwing Arthur overboard to his watery death.

They each encountered each other in Marseilles, France, and during the journey to England, he demanded a duel with Spencer while berating Alexandria. Spencer agreed to a duel on the deck of the ship and proved to be a formidable foe against Arthur. Spencer then demanded Arthur to yield, only Arthur was too stubborn to do so as he drew a pistol on Spencer, resulting in Spencer throwing Arthur overboard to his watery death.

characters.name: Ata Waipa
characters.description: Ata WaipaAliases—Relatives—AffiliationComanche Reservation (Oklahoma)OccupationTribal LeaderBiographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—Status—Date of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight—Weight—Eye colorBrownEthnicityNative AmericanAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count2Portrayed byDanielle VasinovaFirst appearanceLast appearance"The Killing Season""Wrap Thee in Terror" Ata Waipais a character featured in1923:A Yellowstone Origin Story. She is a Comanche tribal leader in the Oklahoma territory who bore witness to a murderous strike on her tribe by MarshalNathan Kentwho was hunting forTeonna Rainwater. She later reached out to MarshalMamie Fossettand requested help fromTwo Spearsin taking down a rogue Marshal.

characters.name: Avery
characters.description: AveryAliasesTanaya BeattyRelatives—AffiliationYellowstone Dutton Ranch(Formerly)OccupationStripper (Formerly)Horse Groomer (Formerly)Biographical informationRelationship statusSingleDate of Birth2-12-1991Place of BirthVancouver, CanadaStatusAliveDate of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderFemaleHeightN/AWeightN/AEye colorBrownEthnicityNative AmericanAppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count8Portrayed byTanaya BeattyFirst appearanceLast appearance"The Unravelling: Part 2""Grass on the Streets and Weeds on the Rooftops" Averyis the former horse groomer forYellowstone Dutton Ranch. Avery was recruited byRip Wheelerfrom a strip club despite his opposition to having a woman sleep in a bunkhouse full of men and mostly worked with grooming the horses. She later quit for unknown reasons. She reemerged inSeason 4and it was discovered that she was living on a ranch with her family back on theBroken Rock Reservationtraining race horses. She later made it clear she had an affection forKayce Dutton, knowing that he was married toMonica, which could explain her reason for leaving Yellowstone.

characters.name: Baapuxti
characters.description: BaapuxtiAliases—RelativesTeonna Rainwater(Cousin)Runs His Horse(Uncle)AffiliationNorth Dakota Boarding School for Native AmericansKills Many ClanOccupation—Biographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—StatusDeceasedDate of Death1923Cause of DeathBeaten to Death byFather RenaudPlace of DeathNorth Dakota Boarding School for Native AmericansPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight—Weight—Eye colorBrownEthnicityNative AmericanAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count4Portrayed byLeenah RobinsonFirst appearanceLast appearance"1923""Ghost of Zebrina" Baapuxtiwas a Native American student at the North Dakota Boarding School for Native Americans and a cousin toTeonna Rainwater. She is first seen in a classroom at the North Dakota school while Teonna is being ruthlessly lectured bySister Maryon the contents of soap. She witnesses Teonna attacking Sister Mary after being chastised for speaking her native tongue to her. Later in the night, she talks with Teonna about ways to heal her wounds with cedar sap, and if they'll live long enough to survive the school. Outside, the girls are taught how to sweep dust. After Baapuxti accidentally brushes dust off of the front porch without being instructed to, she is slapped by Sister Mary. Teonna witnesses this and sweeps her dust off the front porch too. When Sister Mary approaches, Teonna warningly grips her broom, prompting Sister Mary to back off. The girls are then seen being taught how to wash and dry clothes. While being taught how to harvest berries, Baapuxti complains about the thorns.Sister Alicereprimands her for her complaints, then whips her. Teonna comes to her defense and struck Sister Alice with her bucket, but is knocked out with a shovel by Sister Mary. Later that night, Teonna asks Baapuxti to escape the school with her, but she declines, afraid that they will both be found and be put in a far worse place. Baapuxti notices her painted facial markings and sees her collecting Bibles into her pillowcase, to which Teonna tells her that she is making war and leaves. After both Sisters Mary and Alice are killed, Baapuxti is ruthlessly interrogated byFather Renaud, knowing that they're both family members, who tortures her with merciless beatings. She refuses to tell him where Teonna has escaped to, speaking for the final time in her Crow language. Enraged, Father Renaud beats her to death, stomping on her skull. Her body is then wrapped in cloth and buried in an unmarked grave off the school premises.

Baapuxti notices her painted facial markings and sees her collecting Bibles into her pillowcase, to which Teonna tells her that she is making war and leaves. After both Sisters Mary and Alice are killed, Baapuxti is ruthlessly interrogated byFather Renaud, knowing that they're both family members, who tortures her with merciless beatings. Her body is then wrapped in cloth and buried in an unmarked grave off the school premises.

characters.name: Balen
characters.description: BalenAliasesSenator BalenRelatives—AffiliationUnited States SenateOccupation—Biographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—StatusAliveDate of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count1Portrayed byTom JenkinsFirst appearanceLast appearanceYou're the Indian NowYou're the Indian Now SenatorBalenis the elected U.S. Senator of Montana.

characters.name: Banner Creighton
characters.description: Banner CreightonAliases—RelativesEllie Creighton(Wife)Henry Creighton(Son)Affiliation—OccupationSheep HerderBiographical informationRelationship statusMarriedDate of Birth—Place of BirthScotlandStatusDeceasedDate of DeathMarch 28, 1924Cause of DeathShot byWilliam McDowellPlace of DeathLivingstonStation, MontanaPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight6'0"Weight—Eye colorBlueEthnicityCaucasianAppearancesAppears InA Yellowstone Origin StoryEpisode Count14Portrayed byJerome FlynnFirst appearanceLast appearance"1923""A Dream and a Memory" Banner Creightonis an immigrant from Scotland and a sheep farmer who comes into conflict withJacob Dutton. A Scottish immigrant married toEllieand father ofHenry, Banner is a shepherd who seeks to prosper with his fellow shepherds inParadise Valley, Montana, but clashes with landowners, includingJacob Dutton, who want to keep their land while the shepherds' sheep are taken. After complaining to the commission, he was quickly disappointed when Jacob presided over the hearing and sided with the landowners. Banner, however, refused to let his flock die and led his sheep, along with some other shepherds, into the mountains for winter protection. The shepherds encountered Jacob Dutton and some ranch hands who had come to secure their cattle for the winter. One of the shepherds shootJack Duttonupon seeing him, and a gunfight ensued between the shepherds and the ranchers, during which the shepherds surrendered. Taking the law into his own hands, Jacob had Banner and his four surviving companions hanged. However, Banner survived thanks to his horse and returned home. Enraged, he and his fellow shepherds later ambushed Jacob and his family. In the shepherds' attack,Bob Straffordwas killed. Although Jacob and his nephew John fought back and managed to kill some of their attackers, Banner arrived with a machine gun and opened fire on Jacob and John, killing the latter and severely wounding Jacob. Just before, he shouted that he was keeping his promises, having vowed revenge on Jacob.

characters.name: Ben Waters
characters.description: Ben WatersAliases—Relatives—AffiliationBroken Rock ReservationBroken Rock PoliceOccupationPolice ChiefBiographical informationRelationship status—Date of Birth—Place of Birth—StatusAliveDate of Death—Cause of Death—Place of Death—Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight—Weight—Eye color—EthnicityNative AmericanAppearancesAppears InYellowstoneEpisode Count—Portrayed byAtticus ToddFirst appearanceLast appearance"Daybreak""All for Nothing" Ben Watersis a recurring character onYellowstone. He is a tribal police officer at the Broken Rock Reservation, but often works with local police chiefThomas Rainwaterin an effort to punish the Dutton Family for stealing his ancestors land.
